name: Oatmeal Scones
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
3. Combine the first five ingredients in a food processor and process until combined.
4. Add the butter and cut it into the mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
5. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl.
6. Mix in the oats and currants.
7. Add 10 tablespoons of buttermilk and mix just until the dough comes together, adding more buttermilk by tablespoons if needed.
8. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface.
9. Pat the dough into an approximately 1-inch thick round.
10. Cut rounds using a 3-inch cookie cutter.
11. Gather any leftover scraps, pat them into a 1-inch thick round, and cut out more scones.
12. Transfer the scones to the prepared cookie sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart (the scones will spread during baking).
13. Brush the scones generously with the egg glaze.
14. Bake until golden brown, about 30 minutes.
15. Cool slightly on a wire rack before serving warm.
